title: AI Without Fear: Building a Culture of Curiosity
abstract: After training 10,000+ professionals across 100+ workshops, the single biggest predictor of AI adoption isn't technical readiness — it's psychological safety. This keynote gives leaders a framework for moving teams from fear to capability, with practical tools they can deploy the next day.
objectives: Diagnose where AI resistance in a team is actually anxiety in disguise
Apply a framework for moving teams from fear to confident experimentation
Build a culture where curiosity about AI is rewarded, not punished
takeaways: A team-readiness framework leaders can run the next day
Language and rituals that reduce AI anxiety across an organization
